title: Shibarium - Rekt
relevance_summary: Validator compromise followed by flash loan usage on cross-chain bridge

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls flashloan() and has a validator key compromise event in the same block

monitoring_rules: BLOCK ANY TX THAT CALLS FLASHLOAN() AND HAS A VALIDATOR_KEY_COMPROMISE EVENT IN THE SAME BLOCK
summary: Shibarium suffered a $3 million loss due to a validator key compromise, where attackers used flash loans to drain the bridge. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for validator key compromises alongside flash loan calls.
